name: Athena Gold Corporation
description: Athena Gold Corporation is a junior gold exploration company focused on high-grade gold targets in North America's most prolific mining camps. Its flagship Laird Lake project covers 4,158 hectares in Ontario's Red Lake Gold District, where a fully funded ~5,000-metre maiden drill program is underway; it also holds the Excelsior Springs gold project in Nevada's Walker Lane Trend. The company is at the early exploration stage, recently acquiring the Forester Gold Project near Orla Mining's Musselwhite Mine in northwestern Ontario.
